Is the Earth flat?
assistant
No, the Earth is not flat. The shape of the Earth is actually an oblate spheroid, meaning it is slightly flattened at the poles and bulging at the equator. This flattened shape can be observed from space due to satellite images and radar altimetry. While some people may believe in the idea that the Earth is flat, this belief has no scientific basis and contradicts both geology and astronomy.
